tests.scenario: User accesses free version of MindDoc
steps: Launch the MindDoc application
Verify the user is presented with an option to use the free version
tests.expected_result: The user can access the free version without being prompted for payment information

steps: Launch the MindDoc application
Complete the initial user information survey
Verify that the system does not ask repetitive questions
tests.expected_result: The system minimizes repetitive questions when gathering user information

steps: Launch the MindDoc application
Record the user's current emotions
Return to the emotions tracking section after some time
Verify that previous emotions records are displayed
tests.expected_result: The user can view their tracked emotions over time

steps: Launch the MindDoc application
Navigate to the insights or progress section
Verify that weekly progress information is displayed
tests.expected_result: The user can view insights into their weekly progress

tests.scenario: MoodMonitor records mood at multiple points
steps: Launch the MindDoc application
Record the user's current mood
Return to the mood tracking section after some time
Record the user's mood again
tests.expected_result: The MoodMonitor can record their mood at multiple points in time

steps: Launch the MindDoc application
Navigate to the mood tracking section
Verify that previous mood records are displayed
tests.expected_result: The MoodMonitor can view their mood over time

tests.scenario: Emiliana records and reflects on emotions
steps: Launch the MindDoc application
Record Emiliana's current emotions
Reflect on the recorded emotions
tests.expected_result: Emiliana can record and reflect on her emotions

steps: Launch the MindDoc application
Navigate to the support or resources section
Verify that emotional support content is available
tests.expected_result: Emiliana can access emotional support content

steps: Launch the MindDoc application
Record the user's current mental health status
Return to the mental health tracking section after some time
Verify that previous mental health records are displayed
tests.expected_result: The user can track their mental health status over time

steps: Launch the MindDoc application
Navigate to the resources or support section
Verify that mental health resources are available
tests.expected_result: The user can access resources for mental health support
